message:
test(core): E2E orthogonal shock & conformal boundary validation (ft-344j8.11)

8 integration tests validating the conformal prediction anomaly
detection pipeline end-to-end:

1. Conformal detector calibration + orthogonal shock detection
2. Gated detector (entropy gate + conformal) with orthogonal payload
3. Full pipeline: watchdog + EventBus + shock detection
4. ShockResponder pause/clear integration with TraumaDecision
5. Conformal boundary: normal input false positive rate bounded
6. Multiple orthogonal injections with detector adaptation
7. Embedding produces distinct unit vectors
8. Notification payload from full responder pipeline

Tests validate: calibration window fills correctly, p-value thresholds,
EventBus integration, ShockResponder pause/clear lifecycle, and false
positive rate bounded under alpha.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
